description_long: This is a cylindrical beverage can with a matte black exterior and metallic top and bottom. The front features bold, vertical white text reading 'IRN BRU' with a small orange and blue figure in the center, and the words 'ORIGINAL AND BEST' beneath the logo. The can's surface shows subtle signs of condensation and minor scuff marks, giving it a realistic, slightly used appearance. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. The sides and back of the can are mostly plain black, with only faint traces of the logo wrapping around. The overall form is typical of a standard soft drink or energy drink can, commonly found in urban environments.
description: A matte black IRN BRU beverage can with bold white branding and a metallic pull-tab top. The can shows minor wear and condensation, with most details on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the IRN BRU logo in large white letters, orange and blue figure, and 'ORIGINAL AND BEST' text.
description_view_1: Side view with partial logo visible, mostly black surface with some scuff marks.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black surface with faint traces of condensation and minimal branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, almost entirely black with no visible branding or text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large vertical white 'IRN BRU' text, orange and blue figure, and 'ORIGINAL AND BEST' in white on the front; branding is bold and centrally placed.
